summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 (stat point allocation fix) is addressed in LevelUpModal.tsx, CharacterSheet.tsx, and useLocalCharacter.ts. REQ-2 (ability selection enabled at level 1) is addressed in AbilitySelectModal.tsx. REQ-3 (class display on character select) is addressed in CharacterSelectScreen.tsx with CLASS_COLORS, CLASS_ICONS, and CLASS_IMAGES maps plus rendering logic.

hallucinated_features.description: Monster defense values reduced by 80% to fix combat balance
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists 'Changes to the dungeon combat engine or loot system' as a non-goal, yet the diff summary describes reducing all monster defense values by 80% in monsters.ts.

hallucinated_features.description: generateMonster() integration in DungeonSelectScreen passing GeneratedMonster[] to onStartDungeon
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request lists 'Changes to the dungeon combat engine or loot system' as a non-goal. Generating monsters and changing the onStartDungeon callback signature is outside the scope of the three requested fixes.

hallucinated_features.description: DungeonRunScreen updated to use combatAbilities array (up to 3 equipped abilities) and equippedAbilities fallback logic
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists 'Changes to the dungeon combat engine or loot system' as a non-goal.

hallucinated_features.description: Combat engine updated to support up to 3 equipped abilities as an array with independent 12.5% trigger chance per round
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists 'Changes to the dungeon combat engine or loot system' as a non-goal.

hallucinated_features.description: generateStarterEquipment() function added to loot generator
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request lists 'Changes to the dungeon combat engine or loot system' as a non-goal. Adding new loot generation functions is outside scope.

hallucinated_features.description: ItemTooltip updated to prominently display Base Damage for Weapons and Base Defense for Armor
hallucinated_features.reason: This UI change was not requested in any of the three requirements and is not listed as a goal.
